title: [SNC ADDON] Shifter Form
description: Takes advantage of Minecraft's dialog mechanic to change your titan shifter form.
body:
Takes advantage of Minecraft's dialog mechanic to change your titan shifter form, e.g. (Cart --> Attack). without losing the powers that you acquired.

Simply press the quick actions key, "G" by default.

![Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/595e200ef4a7d0c477db9ccbae0c5687d1ed20bd.png)
